## We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more

## Review summary

Based on reviews, created with AI

Most reviewers were unhappy with their experience overall. Many people were dissatisfied with the products, reporting that they did not work as advertised, caused adverse reactions like nausea, migraines, and digestive issues, or even led to hair loss. Customers also found the quality of some products to be poor, citing issues like pills changing color and unpleasant tastes. Reviewers frequently encountered terrible customer service, describing it as dismissive, unhelpful, and difficult to reach. Many also expressed frustration with the subscription model, stating they were enrolled without full knowledge and found it difficult to cancel. The return policy was another major point of contention, with customers reporting unfair terms, issues with receiving full refunds, and being charged for return shipping even for unwanted products.See more

## Review summary
Most reviewers were somewhat happy with their experience overall. Many consumers taking these supplements have reported positive changes in their well-being. People mention improvements in digestion, reduced bloating, and more stable energy levels throughout the day. Some customers have also noted benefits such as better sleep quality, decreased anxiety, and a stronger immune system. Several individuals appreciate the convenience and taste of certain products, making it easier to incorporate them into their daily routines.
However, some consumers express concerns regarding subscriptions, orders, and refunds. A few reviewers report negative experiences with specific products, citing side effects or a lack of noticeable benefits. There are also mentions of issues with the return policy and difficulties in canceling subscriptions. Some customers feel there is a lack of transparency regarding product details and pricing, leading to dissatisfaction.See more
Based on reviews, created with AI

#### Written by the company

Feel Your Best, Be Your Best We create 100% natural supplements with real results and zero woo. With accurate dosing, Arrae’s alchemy capsules solve everyday problems that women constantly deal with. You know what we mean - bloat, anxiety, etc. The stuff that comes up at every girl’s brunch. This is the wellness product for the millennial woman, who has a lot on her plate but doesn’t want to compromise on how she feels. We believe that when it comes to personal goals and peak health, you don’t have to make a choice, you can have both. See more

## Review summary
Most reviewers were unhappy with their experience overall. Customers express concerns about various aspects of their interaction with the company. Many consumers report negative experiences with orders, subscriptions, refunds, and customer service. People highlight issues such as unauthorized charges, difficulties in canceling subscriptions, and lack of transparency regarding subscription terms.
Consumers also express dissatisfaction with the effectiveness of the products. Some reviewers mention experiencing adverse side effects, such as allergic reactions and migraines. Others claim that the products did not deliver the promised results, despite consistent use. A few reviewers also allege deceptive marketing practices, such as hiding negative feedback and using influencers to promote the brand.See more
